translate-all-gemini.settings.apiKeyGemi: API key from Google AI Studio (aistudio.google.com/app/apikey).
translate-all-gemini.settings.apiKeyGiga: Base64-encoded ClientId:ClientSecret from Sber developer portal (developers.sber.ru).
translate-all-gemini.settings.apiEndpoin: The base endpoint for the selected AI provider.
translate-all-gemini.settings.language.h: The language to translate descriptions into.
translate-all-gemini.settings.game.syste: Choose the game system for which you want to translate descriptions.
translate-all-gemini.settings.model.name: Target Model
translate-all-gemini.settings.model.hint: The model to use for translation. Click 'Refresh Models' to update the list.
translate-all-gemini.settings.promptTemp: Path to a text file containing a custom prompt (e.g., /modules/translate-all-gemini/prompts/dnd5e.txt)
translate-all-gemini.settings.aiProvider: Choose the AI provider to use for translation.
